---
title: "reshaping demographic data"
author: "Caroline Nguyen"
date: "2026-03-17"
output: pdf_document
---
# _Initial set-up_

## _Loading in packages and setting working directory_

```{r, setup, include = FALSE}

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir='C:/Users/cangu/Documents/recess minutes 2025/SB291-Recess-Data')

library(tidyverse)

```

## _Loading demographic data_

```{r}

demo <- read_csv("raw data/cenroll2324.csv")

```

# _Cleaning_

```{r}

```
